creator: bsam@ipt.ru
text:
Karel, have you managed to test lang/gnat-gcc34 at 4.x after your
changes? I have some similar patches but didn't commit/send-pr because
of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/101809. For me
the port is still broken at 4.x until the above PR is committed. Can
you confirm that your patch _completely_ unbreak the port for 4.x?

WBR
-- 
bsam
